customerIssues.summary: Prevent stuck inbox items for purged candidates in ready for hire
customerIssues.tldrSummary: ASML hit a job application with a pending Employment Agreement Review Documents inbox item assigned to candidate-as-self; the job application was purged in Ready for Hire / Staffing Event Completed and the task can no longer be actioned. Need to fix the purge logic in Ready for Hire to prevent additional stuck inbox items.

diagnosis.reasoning: Known purge-logic issue: even with Default Disposition when Candidate is Purged enabled, Ready for Hire stage can complete the purge before dispositioning, leaving orphaned candidate-as-self tasks. Multiple prior fixes indicate Workday recognises this as a product defect.

customerIssues.summary: [To Fix] Skills and Automatic Activity Stream Comments Remaining After Job Application Purge
customerIssues.tldrSummary: PwC running Job Application purge with all PDTs except Link Between Person and the Job Application; automatic activity-stream system comments and Skills are not being purged. Triage proposes updating the Comments and Notifications PDT to include Event Record data plus a new IOP method to traverse to Candidate Skill Item.

diagnosis.reasoning: Customer intentionally excluded the Link Between Person and Job Application PDT, which preserves the candidate-application connection by design. Skills and system comments tied to that link are correctly retained. The triage proposal to enrich the PDT confirms the current behaviour is the designed state.

customerIssues.summary: Purged Job Application keeps an unassigned task when the awaiting task has been reassigned
customerIssues.tldrSummary: Reopened on 1 Apr after Purge Plans (HRREC-88211) was reverted from Production due to a regression. Airbus's Preview testing was successful pre-revert; they are awaiting Purge Plans reaching Prod again to confirm fix. Targeted re-deploy: 22 May Preview.

diagnosis.reasoning: HRREC-84365 fix did not cover the reassigned-task scenario; reassigned awaiting tasks persist as unassigned after purge. Workaround exists (exclude Events Awaiting Action PDT) but Workday is delivering the proper fix via Purge Plans. The chain of related fixes confirms it is a recognised defect.

competitorNews.title: Greenhouse rolls out AI scorecard summaries and March 2026 release improvements
bullets: AI-powered scorecard summaries highlight key points across all interview feedback in a single view, with a one-click 'scorecard polish' that cleans up interviewer notes.
March release added candidate-profile improvements, duplicate-candidate tag enhancements, and a multi-calendar view for interview scheduling.
MyGreenhouse Stages exposes the hiring journey to candidates as a transparency surface (read-only candidate timeline).
Continues Greenhouse's deliberate cadence of small, frequent AI insertions across recruiter and interviewer surfaces rather than a single 'agent' release.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: Greenhouse drip-feeding AI into recruiter and candidate surfaces; defend with HiredScore depth and unified Workday Recruiting insights.

competitorNews.title: Workable launches agentic AI for hiring with 'Workable Agent', included free on all plans
bullets: Workable Agent is built directly into the ATS and runs full-cycle: job definition, sourcing, engagement, and screening.
Operates autonomously to deliver interview-ready candidate shortlists 'within days' according to Workable's claims.
Bundled at no extra cost across all Workable plans, weaponising pricing against agentic add-ons sold separately by competitors.
Re-enters the global mid-market and SMB ATS conversation aggressively with a 'free agentic ATS' message.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: Free agentic ATS at the SMB / lower-mid-market end pressures Workday's mid-market story; lean on HiredScore's enterprise data depth and HCM-native handoff.

competitorNews.title: HiredAI launches all-in-one AI recruiting platform from $0/month with 9 integrated tools
bullets: Freemium model: $0/month entry tier, paid tiers from $19.99/month, explicitly framed as 'challenging industry pricing norms'.
Bundles HiredGPT (AI candidate search across 750M+ profiles), Smart ATS with AI scoring, posting, sourcing, dashboards, campaigns, and analytics.
Targets startups, agencies, and SMBs that previously couldn't afford enterprise ATS or AI sourcing tools.
Adds a new disruptive entrant at the bottom of the funnel; long-term risk if they upmarket on AI quality claims.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: New low-end disruptor squeezes pricing perception of AI recruiting; reinforces need to articulate Workday's enterprise governance, security, and HCM-native value.

competitorNews.title: SmartRecruiters for SAP SuccessFactors deepens integration in 1H 2026 release (production 15 May)
bullets: SAP SuccessFactors 1H 2026 confirms tighter SmartRecruiters integration with SAP HCM, production date 15 May 2026.
Winston AI suite (Interview, Chat, Companion, Match) gets compliance-aware outreach, AI Disclosure surface, and global compliance tools.
SAP positions the bundle as 'connected recruiting' across SAP HCM, signalling continued migration of SAP shops away from Taleo / legacy ATSs.
Connected Talent Acquisition narrative directly mirrors Workday + HiredScore + Paradox positioning, intensifying enterprise displacement battles.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: SmartRecruiters + SAP closing the connected-stack story; defend SAP HCM accounts with Workday HCM unification, HiredScore depth, and Paradox frontline coverage.
